items.title: LG’s 2025 model 27-inch UltraGear 300Hz QHD gaming monitor is down to its lowest price today at $200
items.summary:
Amazon is currently offering LG’s 2025 UltraGear 27-inch QHD 300Hz IPS gaming display for $199.99 shipped. This model debuted last year with a $450 price tag and stayed close to that level until it first dropped to $267 during last year’s Black Friday sale. It has more recently been going for around $297, but today’s deal shaves $97 of that mark to deliver a new best price to beat. It’s now going for $27 less than its previous all-time low and our mention from earlier this year, and it’s at a great price right now if you’re in the market to buy a new gaming display.

Now, during this 72-hour window, you can score $417 off the highest going rate of this year ($1,317 off the MSRP), landing it down among its lowest tracked prices – just $83 above the all-time low that we last saw at the beginning of January.
